articles.summary: Apple, merakla beklenen güncellemelerin test sürecine hız kesmeden devam ediyor. Geliştiriciler için hazırlanan iOS 26.4 ve iPadOS 26.4 işletim sistemlerinin üçüncü beta sürümleri resmi olarak indirmeye sunuldu. Kayıtlı geliştiriciler, iPhone veya iPad cihazlarındaki Ayarlar uygulamasından Genel ve Yazılım Güncelleme adımlarını izleyerek bu yeni sürümü cihazlarına kurabiliyorlar. articles.title: CoD: Warzone's New Black Ops Royale Mode: Start Times And How It Works
articles.title_tr: CoD: Warzone's New Black Ops Royale Mode: Start Times And How It Works
articles.summary: Warzone's Season 2 Reloaded update will add a new mode inspired by Call of Duty's original Blackout battle royale. This new mashup is called Black Ops Royale, and it will be played on Black Ops 7's massive Avalon map. Here we highlight all the details about this new Warzone experience, including major weapon, attachment, and perk changes.Table of Contents [hide]Black Ops Royale Start TimesWhat is Black Ops Royale?Black Ops Royale Start TimesBlack Ops Royale won't launch at the normal start time for Call of Duty's seasonal updates. This battle royale experience goes live on Thursday, March 12 at 9 PM PT/Friday, March 13 at 12 AM ET.What is Black Ops Royale?This is an original battle royale mode inspired by Black Ops 4's Blackout. Black Ops Royale strips away several of Warzone's features, including custom loadouts, the Gulag, the cash system, and Buy Stations. Instead, players will start the match with a pistol and need to scavenge everything for the fight.Continue Reading at GameSpot
articles.summary_tr: Warzone's Season 2 Reloaded update will add a new mode inspired by Call of Duty's original Blackout battle royale. This new mashup is called Black Ops Royale, and it will be played on Black Ops 7's massive Avalon map. Here we highlight all the details about this new Warzone experience, including major weapon, attachment, and perk changes.Table of Contents [hide]Black Ops Royale Start TimesWhat is Black Ops Royale?Black Ops Royale Start TimesBlack Ops Royale won't launch at the normal start time for Call of Duty's seasonal updates. This battle royale experience goes live on Thursday, March 12 at 9 PM PT/Friday, March 13 at 12 AM ET.What is Black Ops Royale?This is an original battle royale mode inspired by Black Ops 4's Blackout. Black Ops Royale strips away several of Warzone's features, including custom loadouts, the Gulag, the cash system, and Buy Stations. Instead, players will start the match with a pistol and need to scavenge everything for the fight.Continue Reading at GameSpot
articles.long_summary: Warzone's Season 2 Reloaded update will add a new mode inspired by Call of Duty's original Blackout battle royale.
